testcase.name: Category should exist and allow tests to run
Category should Positive amounts should be flagged as income
Category should Zero amounts should be flagged as income

failure.message: false was not equal to true

testcase.failure: org.scalatest.exceptions.TestFailedException: false was not equal to true at org.scalatest.matchers.MatchersHelper$.indicateFailure(MatchersHelper.scala:392) at testcase.name: Category should Negative amounts should be flagged as expense
Category should Income flag should be false for negative amounts
Category should Expense flag should be false for positive amounts
Category should Group income transactions by category
Category should Group expense transactions by category
Category should Do not mix income and expense transactions in the same category group
Category should Create separate category groups for income and expenses with the same name
Category should Income categories should be ordered alphabetically
Category should Expense categories should be ordered alphabetically
